comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** Approval requirements bypassed by manually added approval. This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Could you take a look at why the /approve flag is not setting the approve label?

I have close to zero knowledge of how that bot works.  Brent set it up, so I'd ask him except it appears to be working now?
